name: constant_price_zero_atr
description: Across 15 days, high=low=close=100.0 every day. Every true range is max(0, 0, 0) = 0, so avg_tr = 0 and ATR% = 0 / 100 * 100 = 0. Pins the lower clamp at 0 for a zero-dispersion OHLC series.
derivation: For each of the 14 TR-eligible days, H-L=0, |H-Cprev|=|100-100|=0, |L-Cprev|=|100-100|=0, so TR=0. avg_tr = mean([0]*14) = 0. recent_close = 100 > 0, so atr_pct = (0/100)*100 = 0.0. Portfolio dot product with weight 1.0 = 0.0.
